header.staleData: Using cached market data from {{date}} — some prices may be stale (providers unreachable).
header.totalValueInfo: Current market value of all positions at the latest daily close.
header.totalPnlInfo: Gain or loss versus what you paid (cost basis), in dollars and percent.
header.dayChangeInfo: Change in portfolio value over the most recent trading day.

cards.sharpeInfo: Return earned per unit of risk, above the risk-free rate. Above 1 is good; below 0 means cash did better.
cards.varInfo: On 95% of days, your one-day loss should not exceed this. Based on the last 2 years (historical method).
cards.betaInfo: Market sensitivity. 1.0 moves with the market; higher amplifies swings, lower dampens them.
cards.maxDrawdownInfo: Worst peak-to-trough decline in the window — the deepest loss you would have ridden through.

charts.performanceHint: Both indexed to 100 at window start

table.title: Positions
table.riskInfo: Share of total portfolio variance contributed by this position (sums to 100%).

state.error: Could not load portfolio data. Is the API running?
state.empty: This portfolio has no positions yet.
